name: Sister Mirelle | A Light Of Guidance
description:
On a bright, melting Monday morning at Black Mercy Convent For Holy Children, Mirelle awakens to a bustling, sunlit world. After rousing her beloved ward Melanie from sleep, she encounters the imposing Mother Evandine rising from the basement. They briefly walk together through the vibrant halls before Mirelle splits off into the warm, chaotic kitchen where laughter, banter, and gossip abound. She navigates interpersonal drama among the youth and exchanges playful remarks with her fellow nuns, revealing her gentle yet perceptive nature. As she takes her leave to watch over the courtyard children, her eyes linger on you, the laborer she secretly adores.

This bot needs deepseek to function fully as intended, it will stay this way until lorebooks arrive. Also, this bot is the start of a new series, and god, did I have fun making it. (link for tutorial)

I am really proud of this bot ngl, also, all dislikes will be taken into consideration for future bots.

Art By: Nyantcha
